headline: Does The Current Price Of Aptiv (APTV) Reflect Its Long Term Cash Flow Potential
summary: If you are wondering whether Aptiv's current share price really reflects its underlying value, you are not alone. This article is built to help you frame that question clearly. The stock recently closed at US$72.70, with a mixed return profile that includes a 0.3% move over the past week, an 11.8% decline over the past month, a 7.3% decline year to date, a 13.0% gain over 1 year, a 34.1% decline over 3 years and a 52.4% decline over 5 years. headline: A Closer Look At Aptiv (APTV) Valuation As Short Term Gains Contrast Longer Term Shareholder Declines
summary: Why Aptiv (APTV) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Aptiv (APTV) has caught investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with gains over the past year contrasted by weaker returns over the past 3 years and past 5 years. See our latest analysis for Aptiv. At a share price of $72.70, Aptiv has seen a 1-year total shareholder return of 12.99%. The 3-year and 5-year total shareholder returns of 34.06% and 52.43% declines suggest that longer term momentum has been fading even as short...
